channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 01lab : notre nouveau protocole colorimétrie décrypté
item.description: Pour évaluer les écrans des produits testés par le 01lab, nous mesurons différents critères, tels que la luminosité, la précision des couleurs ou le contraste. À l'occasion de la refonte de notre protocole, retour et explications sur nos principaux critères de notation.

item.title: I bought a Lumix G1 for $50 — here’s how the world’s first mirrorless camera fares 18 years after launch
item.description: To mark 25 years of Lumix cameras, I bought a secondhand Lumix G1 — the world's first mirrorless camera — 18 years after it entered the stage and transformed the camera market

item.title: Une Audi électrique à 30 000 € : la marque aux anneaux prépare son modèle le moins cher de l’histoire
item.description: Audi descend en gamme avec l’A2 e-tron qui sera son modèle électrique le plus accessible. Celle qui devrait débuter aux alentours des 30 000 € débarquera cette année et pourrait reprendre la base de la Volkswagen ID.3 Neo.

item.title: Avast One Gratuit : bien plus qu’un antivirus, une parade contre les arnaques en ligne [Sponso]
item.description: Protéger ses appareils et sa connexion internet des attaques est devenu enfin simple et abordable. Avast One intègre désormais gratuitement un puissant antivirus ainsi qu’un assistant IA anti-escroquerie.

item.title: Amazon fait chuter le prix du Samsung Odyssey Neo G9, un écran Mini LED XXL de 57″ pensé pour l’immersion
item.description: Le Samsung Odyssey Neo G9 57 pouces est un écran PC gaming ultra-large et haut de gamme que vous retrouvez en promo sur Amazon à 1 599,99 euros au lieu de 1 699 euros.

item.title: Loop Earplugs Discount Codes: 40% Off
item.description: Save on Loop Earplugs, including Quiet 2 and popular gift sets for improved sleep, focus, and comfort.

item.title: Hoka Coupon Codes: 30% Off | May 2026
item.description: Unlock free expedited shipping or 10% off with today’s Hoka discount codes, plus save up to 30% with the best discounts for May 2026.

item.title: Lowe’s Promo Codes and Deals: Up to $300 Off Appliances
item.description: Find the latest Lowe’s promo codes and offers, including up to $300 off select major appliances and $5 off $50 with sign-up, here at WIRED.

item.title: Ulta Promo Codes: Up to 50% Off in May
item.description: Shop the latest beauty trends and save big using an Ulta promo code for beauty tech, makeup, and more.

item.title: Valvoline Coupons & Promo Codes for May 2026
item.description: We've gathered all the top Valvoline coupons and promo codes for May 2026, including deals on full synthetic oil changes and other essential maintenance.

item.title: Squarespace Promo Codes: 20% Off in May 2026
item.description: Get 20% off your next website, 10% off with exclusive Squarespace discount code, 50% off plans, and more top coupons from WIRED.

item.title: Newegg Promo Code: 10% Off in May 2026
item.description: Enjoy up to 10% off your entire order with today’s Newegg promo code and discount codes. Save with the latest deals for gaming PCs, laptops, and computer parts.

item.title: T-Mobile Promo Codes: 25% Off | May
item.description: Discover how to save on T-Mobile Business Internet and phone plans, from sign-up perks and switching rewards to bundled offers and free lines.

item.title: The secret to getting assigned high value projects
item.description: Career advancement isn’t just about talent. If you want to succeed at work, you not only need to get work done, you need to do the right kind of work. That work involves helping to complete projects that really matter to your organization—ones that are central to the mission.

item.title: AI coaches tell leaders what they want to hear
item.description: Human coaches do something harder: They force leaders to confront uncomfortable realities. Recently, a senior executive shared something that initially sounded surprising.
